name: Breakfast Tortillas (Spicy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown and crumble the sausage in a large skillet.
2. Remove the sausage from the pan and drain any excess grease.
3. In the same skillet, scramble the 5 eggs until just done.
4. When the eggs are almost cooked through, add the sausage back into the skillet and mix everything together.
5. Continue cooking until the mixture is heated thoroughly throughout.
6. Sprinkle cheese over the top of the mixture and cover the pan. Remove from heat to melt the cheese.
7. In a separate skillet or frying pan, warm the tortillas until soft and pliable.
8. To assemble, spoon the sausage, egg, and cheese mixture down the center of each tortilla.
9. Add salsa on top of the filling.
10. Fold up the bottom of the tortilla first.
11. Then fold in the sides to create a neat package.
12. Serve warm and enjoy.
